channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fighting persists in Lebanon despite a ceasefire as U.S.-Iran deal is under threat
item.description: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon on Saturday killed at least seven, including two children, after reports of a ceasefire agreement...

item.title: Palestinian-American kids find inspiration, and escape, on the soccer pitch
item.description: A dozen miles from World Cup games at New York/New Jersey Stadium, Palestinian-American children use soccer as an escape from reality...

item.title: Nuns who dedicated their lives to helping others now need assistance in old age
item.description: Ugandan sisters serve as teachers and health advocates. In their final years, they require support. Who will step in to help them?

item.title: ICE shooting victim still suffers, exposing flaws in DHS oversight
item.description: Federal officers shot Ricardo Parias eight months ago during an ICE operation. His lawyer says he remains in pain, revealing gaps in oversight.
